title: aster yunnanensis var. angustior
intro: Aster yunnanensis var. angustior, also known as the narrow-leaved Yunnan aster, is a plant species within the Aster genus. It is a type of flowering plant that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The medicinal properties of Aster yunnanensis var. angustior include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and supporting the immune system.
